title: Police carriage of naloxone: monitoring data
body: "Data collected from the 43 regional forces in England and Wales, Police Scotland, Police Service for Northern Ireland and the British Transport Police on the number of police forces with provision, the number of police officers and staff carrying naloxone, and the number of administrations.  This data includes the naloxone provision status for each police force, as well as information on carriage and administrations, for England and Wales, Scotland, Northern Ireland, and the British Transport Police, as of December 2024. "
